ddls:
CREATE TABLE "horses" (
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each horse */,
  "horse_name" TEXT /* Name of the horse */,
  "exhibitor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exhibitor */,
  "stable_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stable */,
  "breed" TEXT /* Breed of the horse */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the horse */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the horse */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Official registration number of the horse */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Current health status of the horse */,
  "training_level" TEXT /* Training level of the horse */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the horse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("horse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_horses_exhibitor_id FOREIGN KEY ("exhibitor_id") REFERENCES exhibitors ("exhibitor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_horses_stable_id FOREIGN KEY ("stable_id") REFERENCES stables ("stable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exhibitors" (
  "exhibitor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exhibitor */,
  "exhibitor_name" TEXT /* Name of the exhibitor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the exhibitor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the exhibitor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the exhibitor */,
  "membership_status" TEXT /* Membership status of the exhibitor */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the exhibitor joined the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exhibitor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stables" (
  "stable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stable */,
  "stable_name" TEXT /* Name of the stable */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stable */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the stable */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the stable */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the stable's website */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Number of horses the stable can accommodate */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the stable was founded */,
  "stable_type" TEXT /* Type of stable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "riders_drivers" (
  "rider_driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rider/driver */,
  "rider_driver_name" TEXT /* Full name of the rider/driver */,
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the horse */,
  "exhibitor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exhibitor */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the rider/driver */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the rider/driver */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Official license number of the rider/driver */,
  "experience_level" TEXT /* Experience level of the rider/driver */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the rider/driver */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information for the rider/driver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rider_driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_riders_drivers_horse_id FOREIGN KEY ("horse_id") REFERENCES horses ("horse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_riders_drivers_exhibitor_id FOREIGN KEY ("exhibitor_id") REFERENCES exhibitors ("exhibitor_id")
)
column_names: Date of birth of the horse
Official registration number of the horse
Current health status of the horse
URL to an image of the horse
Contact phone number for the exhibitor
Date the exhibitor joined the system
Contact email for inquiries about the stable
Contact phone number for the stable
Number of horses the stable can accommodate
Date of birth of the rider/driver
Official license number of the rider/driver
URL to an image of the rider/driver
Emergency contact information for the rider/driver
